I do so many things, so I'm not going to yell as loud as I want to, okay? And I'll tell you, I'll be telling you to yell. I won't be yelling myself for the sake of my voice, okay? So I want everyone to squeeze your hands together and say yes. Okay, louder. One, two, three. Much louder. One, two, three. Louder. Louder. One, two, three. At the bottom of that picture, notice there are a couple of knobs, like TV knobs, old fashioned TV knobs. If you turn the knobs, it's the picture. I want you to take one knob on the left and turn it clockwise. As you turn it clockwise, notice how the picture gets bigger. Turn that knob on the left clockwise and make the picture bigger. This could be a moving picture, it could be a movie, it could be a still picture of you just closing the deal. You have a great, you're on the, you have a great call. Take a snort of it. Okay. It's so powerful that within a few days, I'm talking days, you'll have an anchor set for certainty. Some of you will have it right here. A lot of you, some people are just more susceptible to it. Just how your brain is wired. If it's just, it's nothing, it's no right or wrong. Okay. So I want you to just put, it's a beginning of a process of building, stacking this anchor. Okay. It gets to the point where once, if you really have an exhilarating experience, okay, so it starts right here. Okay. And we'll keep doing it throughout the weekend. When you leave, they'll carry this with you, especially in work related situations. And when you get that great feeling, when you just had that victory, that close, you take a little bit of a snort of it and then you set an anchor. Okay. So, question. What? You can, I'll give you a resource so you can buy it in Australia. Okay. So, it's, and by the way, for me, this is, it's so powerful that I can change my state on a dime with this stuff. And I was always good at state management. So I, I haven't been able to block shit out. I always have, right? The truth is, is that, you know, this stuff has really, really taken my ability to a, to not just manage my own state and, you know, really, and really, and here's the thing. It's crucial in matters. It's not just when you're closing a deal. When you're brainstorming, when you're looking to overcome challenges in your business, so often what happens is the problems that we have as business owners is that when things aren't going well, we start to try to deal with them when we're feeling disempowered. We don't make good decisions when we're feeling fearful and disempowered. We make our best decisions when we're feeling certain and confident and clear. So it's, the benefits of this is so profound and it cut to so many different things. Okay. That it just, just trust me on this. Use it for a while and you will see. It gets to the point where you almost don't even, sometimes you don't even need it anymore because it's just so you can almost imagine this. You can almost remember the smell the same way. So even if I don't happen to have it on me, I can just imagine that smell of boom, boom, and it creates certainty in me because I've linked it over so long to this feeling of certainty. So I can just remember one thing. You cannot do this just in a room with someone on stage directing you. This is about taking this out into the real world and waiting until you're in the right state or gaggle, meaning right after you close or whatever you're trying to set an anchor for. Wait until that moment and bam, set your anchor. I love you all and we'll talk in tomorrow.
